tr.td: didanosine 400 MG Delayed Release Oral Capsule
lamivudine 150 MG / zidovudine 300 MG Oral Tablet
lopinavir 200 MG / ritonavir 50 MG Oral Tablet
tenofovir disoproxil fumarate 300 MG Oral Tablet
emtricitabine 200 MG / tenofovir disoproxil fumarate 300 MG Oral Tablet
emtricitabine 200 MG / rilpivirine 25 MG / tenofovir disoproxil fumarate 300 MG Oral Tablet
efavirenz 600 MG / emtricitabine 200 MG / tenofovir disoproxil fumarate 300 MG Oral Tablet
cobicistat 150 MG / elvitegravir 150 MG / emtricitabine 200 MG / tenofovir disoproxil fumarate 300 MG Oral Tablet
lamivudine 300 MG / tenofovir disoproxil fumarate 300 MG Oral Tablet
emtricitabine 200 MG / tenofovir alafenamide 25 MG Oral Table

cobicistat 150 MG / elvitegravir 150 MG / emtricitabine 200 MG / tenofovir alafenamide 10 MG Oral Tablet
dolutegravir 50 MG / lamivudine 300 MG Oral Tablet
